# backend-services

> Phased backend monorepo for the eBay Inventory Manager. The canonical runtime package is `services/sidecar`, which exposes eBay Sell APIs to MCP-compatible local assistants.

## Getting Started

- [Root README](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/README.md): Monorepo overview and workspace commands
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Agent routing guide and file map
- [Local Development](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/docs/local-development.md): Setup and validation commands
- [eBay Integration](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/docs/ebay-integration.md): OAuth, readiness, sandbox, publish notes
- [Pricing](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/docs/pricing.md): Current pricing implementation status

## Task Routing Matrix

| Task | Open First | Then | Validate |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Env/config | `packages/env/src/` | `services/sidecar/src/ebay/config.ts` | `pnpm validate:env` |
| Listing workflow | `packages/types/src/index.ts` | `packages/data/src/repositories/listings.ts` | `pnpm --filter @ebay-inventory/types check` |
| Jobs/job runner | `services/sidecar/src/jobs/` | `packages/data/src/repositories/jobs.ts` | `pnpm --filter sidecar test` |
| Pricing | `services/sidecar/src/pricing/` | `services/sidecar/src/jobs/research-price-job.ts` | `pnpm --filter sidecar test` |
| eBay publish | `services/sidecar/src/ebay/` | `services/sidecar/src/scripts/` | `pnpm --filter sidecar test` |
| HTTP/API | `services/sidecar/src/http/` | `services/sidecar/src/api/` | `pnpm --filter sidecar typecheck` |
| Watcher intake | `services/watcher-service/src/` | `packages/data/src/repositories/` | `pnpm --filter @ebay-inventory/watcher-service check` |
| Image processing | `services/image-service/src/` | `services/watcher-service/src/` | `pnpm --filter @ebay-inventory/image-service check` |
| DB schema | `SCHEMA_SPEC.md` | `supabase/migrations/` | inspect live Supabase project |

## Active Runtime Surface

- [Account](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/account.ts)
- [Inventory](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/inventory.ts)

- [Communication](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/communication.ts)
- [Taxonomy](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/taxonomy.ts)
- [Metadata](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/metadata.ts)
